# Teammate External References

> External documentation, regulatory references, and design resources for AI-assisted development.
> This file follows the llms.txt standard to help LLMs quickly discover available reference materials.

## Compliance

- [A11y Compliance](./a11y-compliance/llms.txt): WCAG 2.2 / Section 508 / EAA regulatory background
- [AI Compliance](./ai-compliance/llms.txt): EU AI Act / US state AI laws / South Korea AI Basic Act
